AI just walked out of the chat window.

Jensen Huang declared 2026 the year of the Physical AI Agent at GTC. Not chatbots. Not copilots. Agents that take action in the real world.

NVIDIA shipped Blackwell-series inference chips built for agents. Partnered with Hyundai and Kia on autonomous driving. Unveiled Vera Rubin — a computing platform with up to 10x performance per watt.

And here is the number that matters: 50,000+ bipedal humanoid robots are projected to ship this year. That is 700% growth year-over-year. Embodied AI is no longer a research project.

Fortune 500 companies confirmed production agentic deployments at GTC. Not pilots. Production.

The companies that treat AI as a software layer will be outpaced by those embedding it into physical operations, supply chains, and products. The infrastructure exists. The question is whether your organization is ready.

GYanTech AI architects the transition from conversational AI to agentic AI for executive teams. Link in bio.
